# opnsense_cron_job (Data Source)

Cron jobs allow scheduling commands to run at specified times.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the cron job.

### Read-Only

- `command` (String) Command key.
- `days` (String) Day(s) of month to run.
- `description` (String) Description of the cron job.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this cron job is enabled.
- `hours` (String) Hour(s) to run.
- `minutes` (String) Minute(s) to run.
- `months` (String) Month(s) to run.
- `parameters` (String) Parameters passed to the command.
- `weekdays` (String) Day(s) of week to run.
- `who` (String) User the command runs as.
